text: Implement a real-time importance scoring mechanism within the Karpathy AutoResearch loop to dynamically prioritize and retain critical program segments. This will prevent the loss of recent, high-importance code during remote execution and ensure the agent focuses on preserving the most valuable parts of the program.
reason: This directly addresses the recent 'WinError 10054' by adding a real-time scoring layer, improving the plan's resilience to network instability and ensuring the agent doesn't discard valuable code during remote operations.
